prompt: An open luxury fashion magazine rests on a premium marble table, featuring an elegant editorial layout rather than an ordinary photo. The left page showcases a stunning full-page hero portrait [image1], while the right page displays three beautifully arranged supporting images, with refined editorial typography, generous white space, premium print texture, subtle paper curl, realistic page fold, and glossy magazine reflections. Warm sunlight falls across the pages, creating rich shadows and luxurious highlights. Inspired by Vogue Italia, Harper's Bazaar, and Dior campaign photography. Surreal fashion editorial, cinematic lighting, photorealistic masterpiece, 4K.
promptEn: An open luxury fashion magazine rests on a premium marble table, featuring an elegant editorial layout rather than an ordinary photo. The left page showcases a stunning full-page hero portrait [image1], while the right page displays three beautifully arranged supporting images, with refined editorial typography, generous white space, premium print texture, subtle paper curl, realistic page fold, and glossy magazine reflections. Warm sunlight falls across the pages, creating rich shadows and luxurious highlights. Inspired by Vogue Italia, Harper's Bazaar, and Dior campaign photography. Surreal fashion editorial, cinematic lighting, photorealistic masterpiece, 4K.
promptZh: 一本翻开的奢华时尚杂志放置在高级大理石桌面上，呈现出优雅的编辑排版而非普通的照片。左页展示了一幅令人惊叹的全页主视觉肖像 [image1]，右页则排列着三张精美的辅助图片，配以精致的编辑排版、充裕的留白、高级的印刷质感、细腻的纸张卷曲、逼真的页面折痕以及杂志特有的光泽反光。温暖的阳光洒在页面上，营造出丰富的阴影和奢华的高光。灵感源自 Vogue Italia、Harper's Bazaar 和 Dior 广告大片摄影。超现实时尚编辑风格，电影级布光，照片级真实杰作，4K 分辨率。
